FAQ

Medical &amp; Surgical packaging, FAQ

Who is a good medical & surgical packaging supplier in India?
K P Packaging is a Mumbai based manufacturer and distributor supplying medical & surgical packaging, including Bactite Paper, Grid Lacquer Paper, Non Tearable Paper, to clients across 20+ countries.
What packaging materials does the medical & surgical industry use?
Steam sterilizable Bactite and grid lacquer papers with bacterial barrier and self sealing properties for medical gloves, syringes, catheters and surgical sutures.
Can K P Packaging supply medical & surgical packaging for export?
Yes. K P Packaging serves 425+ clients across more than 20 countries, including medical & surgical customers.

Need medical & surgical packaging?

Share your specification and we'll recommend the right grade and finish.

KPK P Packaging

A three decade old family business converting and distributing coated papers and flexible packaging for pharma, food and FMCG, in India and 20+ countries.
